Our Story

Welcome to Sanjay Electrical Services! Since 1947, we have been proud to serve the Lafayette, LA community with top-quality electrical services. What started as a small family business has grown into one of the most trusted electrical companies in the area.

Our mission is simple: make electricity good for everyone. Whether you need a simple repair or a complex installation, our experienced team is here to help. We believe in doing the job right the first time, every time.

With over 77 years of experience, we've seen it all. Our team of skilled electricians stays up-to-date with the latest techniques and safety standards to provide you with the best service possible.

77+
Years
5-10
Team Members
500+
Happy Clients
100%
Satisfaction

Our Mission & Values

🎯

Quality Workmanship

We take pride in every job we do. From start to finish, we ensure the highest standards of electrical work.

  </article>
</div>
